description: Capital expenditure breakdown by project and category for planning

categories.name: Kalgara Sustaining — Maintenance
categories.description: Planned and breakdown maintenance on processing plant, mobile fleet, and site infrastructure

categories.name: Kalgara Sustaining — Underground Dev.
categories.description: Sustaining underground development to maintain existing ore access; excludes growth drives

categories.name: Kalgara Sustaining — Fleet Rebuild
categories.description: Truck and loader component rebuilds to sustain operating fleet life (8 trucks FY26)

categories.name: Kalgara Growth — TSF Stage 2
categories.description: TSF6 Stage 2 tailings storage facility lift; provides capacity to Q2 FY28

categories.name: Kalgara Growth — North Pit Pre-strip
categories.description: North Pit Stage 2 waste stripping; unlocks baseload ore feed from FY28

categories.name: Kalgara Growth — UG Growth Dev.
categories.description: C-Lode Extension, Eastern Corridor North drives; extending LKU mine life

categories.name: Kalgara Growth — Fleet Expansion
categories.description: New haul trucks and loaders to support open pit TMM growth targets

categories.name: Creston — Feasibility Study
categories.description: Final FS studies, engineering, specialist consultants; completed Oct 2025

categories.name: Creston — Decline Tunnelling
categories.description: Main access decline advance; 712m cumulative at Dec 2025 (target 1,200m pre-FID)

categories.name: Creston — Civil & Portal Works
categories.description: Boxcut, portal installation, reinforced concrete arch sections

categories.name: Creston — Blind Bore & Ventilation
categories.description: Ventilation raise pre-commissioning, drill cutter head fabrication

categories.name: Creston — EPCM & Owner Costs
categories.description: Engineering, procurement, construction management fees pre-FID

categories.name: Resource Dev — West Pit Drilling
categories.description: West Pit Stage 3/4 Extension RC and diamond drilling (capitalised)

categories.name: Resource Dev — LKU Drilling
categories.description: Lower Kalgara Underground resource growth and conversion drilling

categories.name: Resource Dev — Satellite Deposits
categories.description: Near-mine satellite target drilling within 30km of processing plant
